report_name: Wipro and Palo Alto Networks Launch AI-Driven Managed Detection and Response Service

tools.name: Cortex XSIAM
aliases: Extended Security Intelligence and Automation Management
tools.description: A security operations platform by Palo Alto Networks that collects and integrates data from endpoints, network, cloud, and identity sources. It uses machine learning to baseline activity, detect anomalies, and automate incident response.

tools.name: Wipro CyberShield
tools.description: Wipro's suite of managed security services, which includes 24/7 monitoring, threat hunting, incident investigation, and response activities delivered from global Cyber Defense Centers.

tools.name: SOC GURU
tools.description: A proprietary framework by Wipro designed to automate security playbooks and orchestrate complex response actions.

tools.name: WEGA
tools.description: A proprietary AI delivery platform by Wipro used to underpin its MDR service.

tools.name: WINGS
tools.description: A proprietary AI delivery platform by Wipro used to underpin its MDR service.

identities.name: Wipro
identities.description: A global IT, consulting, and business process services company that partnered with Palo Alto Networks to deliver a new AI-powered Managed Detection and Response (MDR) service.

identities.name: Palo Alto Networks
identities.description: A leading cybersecurity company that partnered with Wipro, providing the core Cortex XSIAM technology platform for a new joint MDR offering.

identities.name: European gaming company
identities.description: A customer cited as a successful implementation example of the Wipro and Palo Alto Networks joint MDR service.
